info.name: Cinema Ticket Booking
info.description: Ordered Phase 2 API workflow. Run against clean seeded data with the Cinema Local environment selected.

exec: pm.test('Response contains no raw infrastructure failure details', () => { const text = pm.response.text().toLowerCase(); ['dial tcp', 'connection refused', 'server selection', 'no such host', 'context deadline exceeded', 'i/o timeout'].forEach(value => pm.expect(text).not.to.include(value)); });

request.description: Checks the application, MongoDB, and Redis health statuses.

exec: pm.test('Health response shape is valid', () => { pm.expect(body).to.be.an('object'); pm.expect(body.services).to.be.an('object'); });

pm.test('Response does not expose infrastructure details', () => { const text = pm.response.text().toLowerCase(); ['mongodb://', 'redis://', 'mongo_uri', 'redis_uri', 'password', 'credential'].forEach(value => pm.expect(text).not.to.include(value)); });

pm.test('Seeded movie and showtime are present', () => { const entry = body.showtimes.find(value => value.showtime.id === 'showtime-1'); pm.expect(entry).to.exist; pm.expect(entry.movie.id).to.eql('movie-1'); });

pm.test('Response does not expose infrastructure details', () => { const text = pm.response.text().toLowerCase(); ['mongodb://', 'redis://', 'mongo_uri', 'redis_uri', 'password', 'credential'].forEach(value => pm.expect(text).not.to.include(value)); });

request.description: Assumes a clean database and no active locks.

exec: pm.test('All configured seats are present', () => pm.expect(body.seats.map(seat => seat.seat_no)).to.have.members(expectedSeats));
pm.test('All seats are initially available', () => body.seats.forEach(seat => pm.expect(seat.state).to.eql('AVAILABLE')));

pm.test('Response does not expose infrastructure details', () => { const text = pm.response.text().toLowerCase(); ['mongodb://', 'redis://', 'mongo_uri', 'redis_uri', 'password', 'credential'].forEach(value => pm.expect(text).not.to.include(value)); });

pm.test('Structured identity error is returned', () => { pm.expect(body.error).to.be.an('object'); pm.expect(body.error.code).to.eql('IDENTITY_REQUIRED'); pm.expect(body.error.message).to.be.a('string'); });

pm.test('Response does not expose infrastructure details', () => { const text = pm.response.text().toLowerCase(); ['mongodb://', 'redis://', 'mongo_uri', 'redis_uri', 'password', 'credential'].forEach(value => pm.expect(text).not.to.include(value)); });

pm.test('Structured invalid-seat error is returned', () => { pm.expect(body.error).to.be.an('object'); pm.expect(body.error.code).to.eql('INVALID_SEAT'); pm.expect(body.error.message).to.be.a('string'); });

pm.test('Response does not expose infrastructure details', () => { const text = pm.response.text().toLowerCase(); ['mongodb://', 'redis://', 'mongo_uri', 'redis_uri', 'password', 'credential'].forEach(value => pm.expect(text).not.to.include(value)); });

pm.test('Structured showtime error is returned', () => { pm.expect(body.error).to.be.an('object'); pm.expect(body.error.code).to.eql('SHOWTIME_NOT_FOUND'); pm.expect(body.error.message).to.be.a('string'); });

pm.test('Response does not expose infrastructure details', () => { const text = pm.response.text().toLowerCase(); ['mongodb://', 'redis://', 'mongo_uri', 'redis_uri', 'password', 'credential'].forEach(value => pm.expect(text).not.to.include(value)); });

pm.test('Structured inactive-lock error is returned', () => { pm.expect(body.error).to.be.an('object'); pm.expect(body.error.code).to.eql('LOCK_NOT_ACTIVE'); pm.expect(body.error.message).to.be.a('string'); });

pm.test('Response does not expose infrastructure details', () => { const text = pm.response.text().toLowerCase(); ['mongodb://', 'redis://', 'mongo_uri', 'redis_uri', 'password', 'credential'].forEach(value => pm.expect(text).not.to.include(value)); });

pm.test('Lock response shape and values are valid', () => { pm.expect(body.showtime_id).to.eql(pm.variables.get('showtimeId')); pm.expect(body.seat_no).to.eql(pm.variables.get('releaseSeat')); pm.expect(body.user_id).to.eql(pm.variables.get('user1')); pm.expect(body.ownership_token).to.be.a('string').and.not.empty; pm.expect(body.expires_at).to.be.a('string'); pm.expect(Date.parse(body.expires_at)).to.be.above(Date.now()); });

pm.test('Response does not expose infrastructure details', () => { const text = pm.response.text().toLowerCase(); ['mongodb://', 'redis://', 'mongo_uri', 'redis_uri', 'password', 'credential'].forEach(value => pm.expect(text).not.to.include(value)); });

pm.test('Structured seat conflict is returned', () => { pm.expect(body.error).to.be.an('object'); pm.expect(body.error.code).to.eql('SEAT_CONFLICT'); pm.expect(body.error.message).to.be.a('string'); });

pm.test('Response does not expose infrastructure details', () => { const text = pm.response.text().toLowerCase(); ['mongodb://', 'redis://', 'mongo_uri', 'redis_uri', 'password', 'credential'].forEach(value => pm.expect(text).not.to.include(value)); });

pm.test('Structured ownership error is returned', () => { pm.expect(body.error).to.be.an('object'); pm.expect(body.error.code).to.eql('LOCK_NOT_OWNED'); pm.expect(body.error.message).to.be.a('string'); });

pm.test('Response does not expose infrastructure details', () => { const text = pm.response.text().toLowerCase(); ['mongodb://', 'redis://', 'mongo_uri', 'redis_uri', 'password', 'credential'].forEach(value => pm.expect(text).not.to.include(value)); });
pm.test('Successful release has an empty response body', () => pm.expect(pm.response.text()).to.eql(''));

pm.test('Response does not expose infrastructure details', () => { const text = pm.response.text().toLowerCase(); ['mongodb://', 'redis://', 'mongo_uri', 'redis_uri', 'password', 'credential'].forEach(value => pm.expect(text).not.to.include(value)); });
pm.test('Seat map shape is valid', () => { pm.expect(body.seats).to.be.an('array').with.lengthOf(20); pm.expect(seat).to.exist; });

pm.test('Response does not expose infrastructure details', () => { const text = pm.response.text().toLowerCase(); ['mongodb://', 'redis://', 'mongo_uri', 'redis_uri', 'password', 'credential'].forEach(value => pm.expect(text).not.to.include(value)); });

pm.test('Lock response shape and values are valid', () => { pm.expect(body.showtime_id).to.eql(pm.variables.get('showtimeId')); pm.expect(body.seat_no).to.eql(pm.variables.get('bookingSeat')); pm.expect(body.user_id).to.eql(pm.variables.get('user1')); pm.expect(body.ownership_token).to.be.a('string').and.not.empty; pm.expect(Date.parse(body.expires_at)).to.be.above(Date.now()); });

pm.test('Response does not expose infrastructure details', () => { const text = pm.response.text().toLowerCase(); ['mongodb://', 'redis://', 'mongo_uri', 'redis_uri', 'password', 'credential'].forEach(value => pm.expect(text).not.to.include(value)); });

pm.test('Structured ownership error is returned', () => { pm.expect(body.error).to.be.an('object'); pm.expect(body.error.code).to.eql('LOCK_NOT_OWNED'); pm.expect(body.error.message).to.be.a('string'); });

pm.test('Response does not expose infrastructure details', () => { const text = pm.response.text().toLowerCase(); ['mongodb://', 'redis://', 'mongo_uri', 'redis_uri', 'password', 'credential'].forEach(value => pm.expect(text).not.to.include(value)); });

pm.test('Structured ownership error is returned', () => { pm.expect(body.error).to.be.an('object'); pm.expect(body.error.code).to.eql('LOCK_NOT_OWNED'); pm.expect(body.error.message).to.be.a('string'); });

pm.test('Response does not expose infrastructure details', () => { const text = pm.response.text().toLowerCase(); ['mongodb://', 'redis://', 'mongo_uri', 'redis_uri', 'password', 'credential'].forEach(value => pm.expect(text).not.to.include(value)); });

pm.test('Confirmed booking shape and values are valid', () => { pm.expect(body.id).to.be.a('string').and.not.empty; pm.expect(body.showtime_id).to.eql(pm.variables.get('showtimeId')); pm.expect(body.seat_no).to.eql(pm.variables.get('bookingSeat')); pm.expect(body.user_id).to.eql(pm.variables.get('user1')); pm.expect(body.status).to.eql('CONFIRMED'); pm.expect(body.created_at).to.be.a('string'); });

pm.test('Response does not expose infrastructure details', () => { const text = pm.response.text().toLowerCase(); ['mongodb://', 'redis://', 'mongo_uri', 'redis_uri', 'password', 'credential'].forEach(value => pm.expect(text).not.to.include(value)); });

pm.test('Saved confirmed booking is returned', () => { pm.expect(booking).to.exist; pm.expect(booking.status).to.eql('CONFIRMED'); pm.expect(booking.seat_no).to.eql(pm.variables.get('bookingSeat')); pm.expect(booking.user_id).to.eql(pm.variables.get('user1')); });

pm.test('Response does not expose infrastructure details', () => { const text = pm.response.text().toLowerCase(); ['mongodb://', 'redis://', 'mongo_uri', 'redis_uri', 'password', 'credential'].forEach(value => pm.expect(text).not.to.include(value)); });

pm.test('Structured seat conflict is returned', () => { pm.expect(body.error).to.be.an('object'); pm.expect(body.error.code).to.eql('SEAT_CONFLICT'); pm.expect(body.error.message).to.be.a('string'); });

pm.test('Response does not expose infrastructure details', () => { const text = pm.response.text().toLowerCase(); ['mongodb://', 'redis://', 'mongo_uri', 'redis_uri', 'password', 'credential'].forEach(value => pm.expect(text).not.to.include(value)); });
pm.test('Final seat map shape is valid', () => { pm.expect(body.seats).to.be.an('array').with.lengthOf(20); pm.expect(bookingSeat).to.exist; pm.expect(releaseSeat).to.exist; });
pm.test('Booking and release states are correct', () => { pm.expect(bookingSeat.state).to.eql('BOOKED'); pm.expect(releaseSeat.state).to.eql('AVAILABLE'); });

pm.test('Response does not expose infrastructure details', () => { const text = pm.response.text().toLowerCase(); ['mongodb://', 'redis://', 'mongo_uri', 'redis_uri', 'password', 'credential'].forEach(value => pm.expect(text).not.to.include(value)); });
